name: Goblin
description: A quick and cunning creature that strikes from the shadows

name: Spider
description: A large forest spider with venomous fangs - extremely fast, fragile

name: Wolf
description: A swift predator that hunts in packs - balanced attacker

name: Fire Elemental
description: A being of pure flame with magical powers - high damage caster

name: Lava Golem
description: A massive construct of molten rock and metal - slow tank with high damage

name: Bat
description: A flying bat that attacks in swarms - ultra-fast but very fragile

name: Skeleton
description: An undead warrior with bony armor - protected but fragile bones

name: Zombie
description: A shambling undead - durable but slow and decaying

name: Wraith
description: A spectral being with powerful magic - fast magical caster

name: Bear
description: A powerful forest predator - heavy hitter with high health

name: Treant
description: An ancient tree spirit - slow but heavily armored

name: Boar
description: A fierce woodland beast that charges and gores

name: Salamander
description: A fire-dwelling lizard that strikes from the heat haze

name: Ember Spirit
description: A wisp of living flame - bursts of magical damage

name: Magma Beast
description: A creature of molten rock - devastating heavy attacks

name: Ghoul
description: A ravenous undead that lunges from the shadows

name: Lich
description: An undead spellcaster with potent magical strikes

name: Wight
description: A spectral guardian of the crypt - tough and controlling

name: Sandstorm Flanker
description: A desert raider that cuts in from the blinding sand — fast strikes from the edge of vision

name: Sand Serpent
description: A buried serpent that erupts from the dunes — ambushes with venomous precision

name: Dune Roller
description: A armored desert dweller that curls and rolls at high speed — hits hard on impact

name: Sun Lance Scorpion
description: A scorpion whose tail gleams like a spear in the sun — precise, poisonous strikes

name: Glare Stalker
description: A hunter that uses reflected sunlight to blind prey before closing in

name: Glass Shard Golem
description: A construct of fused desert glass — sharp, brittle, and deadly up close

name: Mirage Hunter
description: A predator that hunts by false shapes in the heat haze — strikes where you aren't looking

name: Shadow Wraith
description: A shade born of desert noon — phases through light and drains the unwary

name: Restorative Leech
description: A parasitic desert leech that feeds and mends itself — sustains through stolen life

name: Stone Colossus
description: A towering statue of carved sandstone — slow, massive, and nearly immovable

name: Poison Dart Sentinel
description: A tomb guardian that fires venomous darts from stillness — patient and precise

name: Sun Priest
description: A desert cleric who channels solar wrath — casts with burning conviction

name: Guardian Scarab
description: A sacred beetle grown to impossible size — armored and fiercely territorial

name: Tomb Creeper
description: A corpse-thief that crawls through burial passages — strikes from tight darkness

name: Sarcopha Gus
description: An undead bound to a cracked sarcophagus — shambling, heavy, and hard to put down

name: Burial Lich
description: An ancient necromancer of the tombs — commands death with cold intelligence

name: Mummy
description: A wrapped undead preserved by desert rites — durable and relentless

name: Ancestor's Shade
description: The lingering spirit of a forgotten dynasty — strikes with the weight of old grudges

name: Hawk
description: A desert raptor that dives from above — swift aerial strikes

name: Rock Lobber
description: A brute that hurls sun-baked stones from a distance — simple, crushing force

name: Edge Stalker
description: A blade-wielding hunter that circles the rim of sight — waits for an opening

name: Scavenger Rat
description: A gnawing vermin of the wastes — quick, dirty, and opportunistic

name: Toxic Drinker
description: A mutated desert dweller that drinks poison to fuel its attacks

name: Deserter Shade
description: The ghost of a soldier who fled into the dunes — elusive and bitter

name: Storm Caller
description: A mountain mystic who summons thunder and wind — casts from afar

name: Altitude Wraith
description: A thin-air specter that haunts high passes — cold, fast, and disorienting

name: Summit Titan
description: A giant of stone and ice at the mountain peak — slow but overwhelming

name: Cinder Hound
description: A fire-scorched hound that hunts in bursts of speed and fury

name: Magma Creeper
description: A lava-dwelling predator that crawls through fissures — ambushes from below

name: Ashwing Harpy
description: A winged scavenger of volcanic skies — fast, shrieking dives

name: Soot Golem
description: A construct of compressed ash and cinders — armored and smothering

name: Cave Ember Toad
description: A bloated toad swollen with inner heat — lurks and lunges from cave pools

name: Smog Lurker
description: A predator hidden in volcanic fumes — strikes when visibility fails

name: Charwood Stalker
description: A burned forest hunter that moves through blackened trunks — patient ambusher

name: Scorched Treant
description: A fire-blackened tree spirit — slow, thick-barked, and heavy-hitting

name: Reignited Wisp
description: A flame spirit that flares back to life — bursts of magical fire

name: Bridge Warden
description: A lava-bridge guardian in scorched armor — holds the line with discipline

name: Lava Spitter
description: A creature that spews molten rock from a distance — ranged elemental attacker

name: Flame Drifter
description: A wandering fire spirit that darts through heat currents — mobile and evasive

name: Temple Knight
description: A zealot knight sworn to the flame temple — armored, trained, unyielding

name: Pilar Watcher
description: A sentinel posted beside temple pillars — still, alert, and heavily guarded

name: Torch Wraith
description: A ghost bound to eternal flame — deceptive strikes from flickering light

name: Royal Flame Guard
description: An elite temple defender in ceremonial armor — disciplined and resilient

name: Seal Caster
description: A mage who binds enemies with fiery sigils — technical, controlling magic

name: Throne Effigy
description: A stone guardian carved to sit before a molten throne — immovable sentinel

name: Blood Feeder
description: A parasite that drains life from open wounds — predatory and precise

name: Vent Spore
description: A fungal spore creature born from volcanic vents — spreads harm through contact

name: Crystal Leech
description: A glassy parasite that latches to heated crystal — drains and hardens

name: Slag Tortoise
description: A turtle shelled in cooled slag — slow, dense, and extremely tough

name: Island Drifter
description: A creature carried by thermal winds between lava isles — fast and hard to pin down

name: Molten Crab
description: A crab with a shell of hardened magma — armored and snapping

name: Amber Sentinel
description: A guardian encased in ancient amber — preserved, patient, and hard to crack

name: Overflow Imp
description: A mischievous spirit of excess heat and pressure — chaotic and evasive

name: Amber Trapper
description: A predator that lures prey into sticky amber pools — traps with cunning

name: Territorial Hound
description: A fierce hound that defends its hunting ground — aggressive pack striker

name: Alpha Wolf
description: The lead wolf of a border pack — fast, commanding, and relentless

name: Bone Spreader
description: A necromantic scavenger that scatters cursed bones — spreads decay and dark magic

name: Tribute Beast
description: A bound creature left as offering to old powers — heavy, savage, and enduring

name: Cursed Bear
description: A bear twisted by forest hexes — powerful, brutal, and hard to fell

name: Mound Warden
description: A guardian of ancient burial mounds — armored and territorial

name: Moon Blessed
description: A forest spirit touched by moonlight — heals and harms with sacred power

name: Echo Stalker
description: A hunter that strikes from reflected sound — deceptive and hard to track

name: Vigil Alpha
description: The commander of a night watch pack — leads with strength and cunning

name: Guile Sprite
description: A tiny fey spirit of trickery — fast, mischievous, and unpredictable

name: Hedge Hound
description: A lean hound that hunts along maze hedges — quick flanking predator

name: Dead End Mimic
description: A shapeshifter that waits at false exits — lures victims into ambush

name: Maze Runner
description: A creature born to sprint endless corridors — blinding speed, low endurance

name: Loop Shade
description: A spirit trapped in repeating paths — disorients and strikes from nowhere

name: Instinct Eater
description: A horror that feeds on prey’s fear and reflex — preys on hesitation

name: Duplicate
description: A mirror-image foe that copies your movements — unsettling and elusive

name: Shattered Reflection
description: A broken mirror spirit that attacks through fractured images

name: The Other
description: A doppelganger that wears your own face — psychological and deadly

name: Thorn Boar
description: A bristling boar wrapped in thorny hide — charges with brutal force

name: Root Sprite
description: A small woodland spirit tied to living roots — nimble and evasive

name: Rattlesnake
description: A coiled viper that strikes without warning — venomous and precise

name: Nectar Drone
description: A oversized pollinator driven to frenzy — fast, swarming attacks

name: Pollen Wraith
description: A drifting spirit of choking pollen — obscures sight and saps strength

name: Valley Prowler
description: A lowland predator that hunts at dusk — swift and aggressive

name: Living Wall Crawler
description: A vine-creature that scales vertical stone — ambushes from above

name: Animated Vine
description: A writhing plant lash given hostile will — whips with disciplined force

name: Ruin Wraith
description: A ghost of a fallen settlement — lingers in broken halls

name: Reed Stalker
description: A hunter that moves unseen through tall reeds — silent, precise strikes

name: Mosquito Swarm
description: A cloud of blood-hungry insects — overwhelming speed, fragile individually

name: Mud Lurker
description: A bog predator that rises from thick mud — ambushes from below

name: Current Rider
description: A spirit that surfs river currents — fast, fluid, and evasive

name: Slick Eel
description: A slippery river eel that strikes in flashes — agile and hard to catch

name: Hollow Drifter
description: A empty-souled wanderer of misty hollows — elusive and unsettling

name: Fog Mimic
description: A shapeshifter hidden in river fog — lures prey into false safety

name: Cold Creeper
description: A chill-loving predator of damp caves — slow approach, sudden strike

name: Shelf Specter
description: A ghost that haunts narrow cave ledges — strikes from cramped angles

name: Glow Mite
description: A bioluminescent cave insect — small, quick, and distracting

name: Frost Creeper
description: A ice-cloaked cave stalker — patient ambusher in the cold dark

name: Cave Lurcher
description: A heavy cave beast that lurches from darkness — slow, crushing blows

name: Chronicle Watcher
description: A lore-keeper spirit that guards ancient records — wise, magical, and vigilant

name: Sinkhole Lurker
description: A predator that waits beneath unstable ground — pulls prey down to strike

name: Ink Stalker
description: A shadowy hunter that moves through dark water — precise, ink-cloud ambushes

name: Vent Sprite
description: A playful but dangerous spirit of cave vents — mischievous and evasive

name: Lion Fish
description: A venomous spined fish — beautiful, slow, and painfully precise

name: Mist Phantom
description: A formless spirit of deep mist — drifts through attacks and confuses foes

name: Fourecourt Guard
description: A disciplined guard of an flooded court — armored sentinel of the depths

name: Depth Drainer
description: A abyssal creature that saps life from the deep — magical life drain

name: Tide Sentinel
description: A armored watcher of tidal passages — holds ground against the current

name: Pressure Monk
description: A ascetic trained in crushing depth — martial discipline under extreme force

name: Cascade Rider
description: A rider of falling water and rapids — fast, fluid, and relentless

name: Aqueduct Warden
description: A guardian of ancient water channels — armored and immovable

name: Still Gazer
description: A meditative watcher of unmoving pools — reads foes and strikes with intent

name: Undertow Shade
description: A ghost dragged beneath the current — pulls and strikes from below

name: Throne Revenant
description: An undead monarch risen from a sunken throne — commands death with royal fury
